name: Hybrid Microsoft Teams Outbound Connector
description: Create, update, and send a message to your Microsoft Teams

properties.label: Type
properties.description: Authentication type depends on your Microsoft Entra (Azure AD) configuration. See connector documentation

properties.label: Client secret
properties.tooltip: The secret value of the Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure AD) application

properties.label: Client secret
properties.tooltip: The secret value of the Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure AD) application; optional, depends on whether the client is public or private

properties.label: Chat type
properties.tooltip: The type of a new chat

properties.label: Members
properties.tooltip: See the Members property reference.

properties.label: Expand response
properties.tooltip: See the expand response reference.

properties.label: Content type
properties.tooltip: The type of the content. Possible values are text and html

properties.label: Attachments
properties.tooltip: Optional list of attachments. Each item must have an 'id', 'contentType' (e.g. 'application/vnd.microsoft.card.adaptive') and 'content' (e.g. an Adaptive Card JSON payload). Attachment IDs must match <attachment id="..."></attachment> tags in the message body (auto-appended if missing).

properties.label: Top
properties.tooltip: Controls the number of items per response.

properties.label: Filter
properties.tooltip: Sets the date range filter for the lastModifiedDateTime and createdDateTime properties. See the filter query parameter reference.

properties.label: Group ID
properties.tooltip: The Microsoft Teams group ID.

properties.label: Owner
properties.tooltip: Enter ID or principal name of a user

properties.label: Group ID
properties.tooltip: The Microsoft Teams group ID.

properties.label: Group ID
properties.tooltip: The Microsoft Teams group ID.

properties.label: Filter
properties.tooltip: Sets the search filter. See the filter query parameter reference.

properties.label: Group ID
properties.tooltip: The Microsoft Teams group ID.

properties.label: Content type
properties.tooltip: The type of the content. Possible values are text and html

properties.value: =if documents_documentMode = "multiple" then documents_multiple_expression else if documents_documentMode = "single" then (if documents_single_documentSource = "camunda" then [documents_single_camundaReference] else if documents_single_documentSource = "inline" then [{ "camunda.document.type": "inline", content: documents_single_inline_content, name: documents_single_inline_fileName, contentType: documents_single_inline_contentType }] else if documents_single_documentSource = "external" then [{ "camunda.document.type": "external", url: documents_single_external_url, name: documents_single_external_fileName }] else null) else null

properties.label: Attachments
properties.tooltip: Optional list of attachments. Each item must have an 'id', 'contentType' (e.g. 'application/vnd.microsoft.card.adaptive') and 'content' (e.g. an Adaptive Card JSON payload). Attachment IDs must match <attachment id="..."></attachment> tags in the message body (auto-appended if missing).

properties.label: Group ID
properties.tooltip: The Microsoft Teams group ID.

properties.label: Group ID
properties.tooltip: The Microsoft Teams group ID.

properties.label: Top
properties.tooltip: Controls the number of items per response

properties.label: With replies
properties.tooltip: Return message replies

properties.label: Group ID
properties.tooltip: The Microsoft Teams group ID.

properties.label: Group ID
properties.tooltip: The Microsoft Teams group ID.

properties.label: Result variable
properties.description: Name of variable to store the response in. Details in the documentation.

properties.label: Result expression
properties.description: Expression to map the response into process variables. Details in the documentation.

properties.label: Error expression
properties.description: Expression to handle errors. Details in the documentation.

properties.label: Retry backoff
properties.description: ISO-8601 duration to wait between retries

steps.name: Chat
